interfaces.name: getHomeOverview
interfaces.description: Get homepage highlight sections: latest releases, featured videos, upcoming shows, and featured merch.

interfaces.name: getTourFilterOptions
interfaces.description: Get available city, country, and month/year options to filter tour events.

interfaces.name: searchTourEvents
interfaces.description: Search and list tour events with optional filters by city, country, month/year and sort by date.

interfaces.name: getEventDetailWithTickets
interfaces.description: Get detailed information for a specific tour event, including all ticket options.

interfaces.name: saveEventTicketSelection
interfaces.description: Save a specific event and ticket choice for later (saved ticket, itinerary, or favorite). Creates itinerary items internally.

parameters.name: ticket_type
parameters.description: Used when no specific ticket option is chosen, e.g., 'general_admission'

parameters.name: itinerary_name
parameters.description: Optional label such as 'october_2025_mini_tour' when context is 'itinerary'

interfaces.name: getItineraryOverview
interfaces.description: Get all saved itinerary items with summary stats for the itinerary page.

interfaces.name: updateItineraryItem
interfaces.description: Update an existing itinerary item, such as changing ticket type or quantity.

interfaces.name: removeItineraryItem
interfaces.description: Remove an itinerary item from the user's itinerary.

interfaces.name: getDiscographyViewState
interfaces.description: Get the current discography page view state (albums vs tracks, filters, sort).

interfaces.name: updateDiscographyViewState
interfaces.description: Update and persist the discography page view state.

interfaces.name: searchAlbums
interfaces.description: Search albums for the discography page with album type and year range filters.

interfaces.name: searchTracks
interfaces.description: Search tracks with year range, genre, search text and sort options.

parameters.name: search_text
parameters.description: Free text filter, e.g., titles containing 'midnight'

interfaces.name: getAlbumDetail
interfaces.description: Get full details and tracklist for a specific album.

interfaces.name: setAlbumFavoriteStatus
interfaces.description: Mark or unmark an album as favorite.

interfaces.name: getTrackDetailWithLyrics
interfaces.description: Get track details, album context, and available lyrics languages with default lyrics text.

interfaces.name: getTrackLyrics
interfaces.description: Get lyrics for a specific track in a requested language.

interfaces.name: setTrackFavoriteStatus
interfaces.description: Mark or unmark a track as favorite.

interfaces.name: addTracksToNewPlaylist
interfaces.description: Create a new playlist and add the given tracks in the provided order.

interfaces.name: addTracksToPlaylist
interfaces.description: Add one or more tracks to an existing playlist.

interfaces.name: getPlaylistsOverview
interfaces.description: Get a list of all user-created playlists for the playlists page.

interfaces.name: getPlaylistDetail
interfaces.description: Get playlist metadata and its tracks (for playlist view, reordering, and removal).

interfaces.name: updatePlaylistOrder
interfaces.description: Update the order of tracks within a playlist.

interfaces.name: removeTrackFromPlaylist
interfaces.description: Remove a track from a playlist.

interfaces.name: getStoreFilterOptionsAndState
interfaces.description: Get available store categories, rating filters, sort options, and current store view state.

interfaces.name: searchProducts
interfaces.description: Search merch products for the store page with category, rating, price range, and sort options.

interfaces.name: getProductDetail
interfaces.description: Get full product details for a merch item including rating and available sizes/colors.

interfaces.name: addProductToCart
interfaces.description: Add a configured product (size/color/quantity) to the cart. Creates the cart if it does not exist.

interfaces.name: getCart
interfaces.description: Get the current cart contents, including item details and overall totals.

interfaces.name: updateCartItemQuantity
interfaces.description: Update the quantity for a specific cart item and recalculate totals.

interfaces.name: removeCartItem
interfaces.description: Remove an item from the cart and update totals.

interfaces.name: getNewsletterOptions
interfaces.description: Get newsletter interest topics and allowed email frequencies for the signup form.

interfaces.name: getNewsletterSubscription
interfaces.description: Get the current newsletter subscription data to prefill the form, if any.

interfaces.name: submitNewsletterSubscription
interfaces.description: Create or update the newsletter subscription with user details, interests, and frequency.

interfaces.name: getVideoFilterOptions
interfaces.description: Get available video content types and sort options for the videos page.

interfaces.name: searchVideos
interfaces.description: Search videos with filters for content type, date range, duration, view count, and sorting.

parameters.name: date_from
parameters.description: ISO date string for uploaded or recorded date lower bound

parameters.name: date_to
parameters.description: ISO date string for upper bound

interfaces.name: getVideoDetail
interfaces.description: Get metadata and playback URL for a specific video.

interfaces.name: addVideoToWatchLater
interfaces.description: Add a video to a watch later list, creating or using a default list if none is provided.

interfaces.name: getWatchLaterList
interfaces.description: Get a watch later list and its items (default list if no id provided).

interfaces.name: getAboutContent
interfaces.description: Get content for the About page including biography, highlights, and press quotes.

interfaces.name: getContactInfo
interfaces.description: Get contact details and social links for the Contact page.

interfaces.name: submitContactForm
interfaces.description: Submit a general inquiry or feedback via the Contact form.

interfaces.name: getPoliciesContent
interfaces.description: Get privacy policy and terms of use content for the Policies page and references.

helperFunctions.name: _getOrCreateCart
helperFunctions.description: Internal helper to get the existing cart from storage or create a new one if none exists.

helperFunctions.name: _recalculateCartTotals
helperFunctions.description: Internal helper to recalculate cart item subtotals and overall totals after changes.

helperFunctions.name: _getOrCreateDefaultItinerary
helperFunctions.description: Internal helper to get or create the default itinerary used for saved shows and mini-tours.

helperFunctions.name: _getOrCreateDefaultWatchLaterList
helperFunctions.description: Internal helper to get or create the default 'watch_later' list.

helperFunctions.name: _updateDiscographyViewStateStorage
helperFunctions.description: Internal helper to persist discography view state between page loads.

helperFunctions.name: _updateStoreViewStateStorage
helperFunctions.description: Internal helper to persist store view filters and sort order between visits.
